purpose: Convert the 50-repository open-source stack into a safe Dealix tool adoption registry.
scoring_formula: score = autonomy + revenue + safety + locality + compliance - effort - risk

tools.name: n8n
tools.dealix_use: Approval queues, daily runs, safe connector orchestration.
tools.next_action: Pilot local n8n workflow for approval cards.

tools.name: Dify
tools.dealix_use: Build internal agents for research, scoring, and proposal drafts.
tools.next_action: Evaluate as visual builder for Dealix Command Room.

tools.name: Ollama
tools.dealix_use: Run private classification, summarization, and cheap draft generation.
tools.next_action: Document private Ollama worker pattern.

tools.name: Open WebUI
tools.dealix_use: Founder UI for local model tasks and internal assistants.
tools.next_action: Defer until Ollama worker policy exists.

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.dealix_use: Prototype role-based agents for research, proof, and content.
tools.next_action: Compare against LangGraph for simple team workflows.

tools.name: Langflow
tools.dealix_use: Prototype flows for non-engineering editing.
tools.next_action: Use only if Dify is not enough.

tools.name: AutoGPT
tools.dealix_use: Research-only inspiration for autonomy patterns.
tools.next_action: Keep as reference, not production dependency.

tools.name: LangChain
tools.dealix_use: Adapters for tool use, document chains, and retrieval.
tools.next_action: Adopt selectively behind internal interfaces.

tools.name: LangGraph
tools.dealix_use: Core candidate for Strategy Execution OS state machines.
tools.next_action: Prototype daily strategy graph.

tools.name: Firecrawl
tools.dealix_use: Lead intelligence and market snapshots from allowed sources.
tools.next_action: Add as research adapter with source policy.

tools.name: Mem0
tools.dealix_use: Remember account-level preferences and learning loops.
tools.next_action: Prototype memory only on synthetic data.

tools.name: RAGFlow
tools.dealix_use: Knowledge ingestion for client docs and market reports.
tools.next_action: Defer until first paid client knowledge base.

tools.name: Haystack
tools.dealix_use: Alternative to RAGFlow/LlamaIndex for robust pipelines.
tools.next_action: Evaluate only if RAGFlow is too heavy.

tools.name: LlamaIndex
tools.dealix_use: Index company brain docs, proposals, and proof packs.
tools.next_action: Use for internal docs retrieval prototype.

tools.name: Browser-use
tools.dealix_use: Manual-assist research and QA tasks.
tools.next_action: Research safe use cases only.

tools.name: Twenty
tools.dealix_use: CRM layer once Dealix has 5 active leads.
tools.next_action: Defer until lead volume justifies CRM.

tools.name: SalesGPT
tools.dealix_use: Reference for sales conversation flow design.
tools.next_action: Use patterns only; do not enable live agent.

tools.name: Cal.com
tools.dealix_use: Booking links for snapshots, sprints, and discovery calls.
tools.next_action: Integrate after first landing page CTA.

tools.name: EvolutionAPI
tools.dealix_use: Approved WhatsApp operations after opt-in and suppression rules.
tools.next_action: Keep disabled until approval center and suppression list exist.

tools.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
tools.dealix_use: Generate video concepts after proof packs exist.
tools.next_action: Use as content lab after proof packs.

tools.name: OpenMontage
tools.dealix_use: AI video production reference.
tools.next_action: Evaluate later against MoneyPrinterTurbo.

tools.name: markitdown
tools.dealix_use: Convert PDFs, docs, decks, and client files into analysis-ready markdown.
tools.next_action: Add to local document ingestion workflow.

tools.name: Appwrite
tools.dealix_use: Future backend alternative reference only.
tools.next_action: Keep as future alternative, not current migration.

tools.name: Metabase
tools.dealix_use: Dashboards after reporting tables exist.
tools.next_action: Use after Postgres reporting tables exist.

tools.name: Aider
tools.dealix_use: Local development helper for small safe fixes.
tools.next_action: Use for local development on small fixes.

tools.name: Tabby
tools.dealix_use: Self-hosted coding assistant candidate.
tools.next_action: Defer until local dev environment stabilizes.

tools.name: codebase-memory-mcp
tools.dealix_use: Index repository knowledge for coding agents.
tools.next_action: Evaluate with synthetic repo subset.

tools.name: last30days-skill
tools.dealix_use: Market research skill inspiration.
tools.next_action: Use as skill inspiration only.

tools.name: Agent-Reach
tools.dealix_use: Internet intelligence reference after source policy exists.
tools.next_action: Keep as reference until source policy exists.

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.dealix_use: Team AI assistant candidate.
tools.next_action: Evaluate after core Strategy OS exists.

tools.name: awesome-claude-skills
tools.dealix_use: Source of patterns for Dealix skill packs.
tools.next_action: Mine for safe skill patterns.

tools.name: AutoGen
tools.dealix_use: Alternative orchestration framework for experiments.
tools.next_action: Compare with LangGraph/CrewAI later.

tools.name: SuperAGI
tools.dealix_use: Reference for autonomous agent UX and tooling.
tools.next_action: Reference only.

tools.name: AnythingLLM
tools.dealix_use: Private knowledge base for Dealix brain and client docs.
tools.next_action: Pilot for internal Dealix docs only.

tools.name: PrivateGPT
tools.dealix_use: Alternative local-only doc Q&A for sensitive docs.
tools.next_action: Evaluate for sensitive/offline use.

tools.name: Bitwarden Server
tools.dealix_use: Secrets policy and vaulting pattern.
tools.next_action: Document secrets handling baseline.

tools.name: developer-roadmap
tools.dealix_use: Internal training and hiring rubric reference.
tools.next_action: Use for team growth docs.

tools.name: System Design 101
tools.dealix_use: Architecture learning and design checklist.
tools.next_action: Use for engineering quality checklist.

tools.name: Hermes Agent
tools.dealix_use: Track the user's local Hermes setup and requirements.
tools.next_action: Resolve exact repo/package before adoption.

tools.name: pi-mono
tools.dealix_use: Track as research candidate only.
tools.next_action: Resolve exact repo before adoption.

tools.name: Ragas
tools.dealix_use: Evaluate RAG answers, retrieval quality, and hallucination risk.
tools.next_action: Add eval stage to RAG workflows.

tools.name: Phoenix
tools.dealix_use: Trace agent runs and diagnose quality issues.
tools.next_action: Pilot on synthetic strategy runs.

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.dealix_use: Prompt/version tracking for Strategy OS.
tools.next_action: Evaluate with Phoenix; choose one.

tools.name: OpenTelemetry Collector
tools.dealix_use: Audit logs and operational telemetry for agents.
tools.next_action: Use for production-grade logging later.

tools.name: PostHog
tools.dealix_use: Track website, funnel, and command room usage.
tools.next_action: Install only after product routes stabilize.

tools.name: Vaultwarden
tools.dealix_use: Small-team secrets vault option.
tools.next_action: Use only if managed Bitwarden is not chosen.

tools.name: Qdrant
tools.dealix_use: Store embeddings for Dealix brain and client RAG.
tools.next_action: Evaluate with pgvector; choose one.

tools.name: Unstructured
tools.dealix_use: Ingest messy PDFs/docs for research and proof packs.
tools.next_action: Use with markitdown comparison.

tools.name: Playwright
tools.dealix_use: Website smoke tests and controlled internal QA.
tools.next_action: Use for dealix.me smoke tests.

tools.name: Temporal
tools.dealix_use: Reliable long-running internal workflows.
tools.next_action: Defer until workflows require retries/state durability.
